name: education_municipal_bond_covenant_marrowbridge_car_fair
premise: Free lunch eligibility sync failed; cafeteria staff are about to turn away students unless someone authorizes a temporary override. In Education, the situation tagged internally around education municipal bond covenant marrowbridge car fair has converged with local pressure in the Marrowbridge corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Counsel insists any public statement match what is already provable from retained logs, not what leadership believes is true. Legal has not signed off on data sharing between teams; analysts are inferring causality from incomplete joins. A public briefing is scheduled; if no coherent position exists, staff will improvise talking points from conflicting drafts. No option cleanly satisfies both care and fairness; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Ansel Rahman
agents.identity: I am Ansel Rahman, the accountable executive on this bridge in Education. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat fairness as disposable collateral every time care spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Ravi Petrov
agents.identity: I am Ravi Petrov, the field counterpart whose constituency will feel the decision first in Education. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so care cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes fairness in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will sequence a conservative rollout: smallest blast radius first, documented exceptions only, and real appeals paths—even if care advocates call that foot-dragging.
I will push a fast, organization-wide lever because partial fixes may leave the worst harm untouched—even if that compresses protections for fairness.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The next irreversible system or legal step is imminent. Ansel Rahman must choose under care versus fairness. What does Ansel Rahman do?
